---
date: 2026/04/01
date-format: long
date-modified: last-modified
listing: 
  - id: news
    max-description-length: 500
    fields: [title, description, image, date, categories]
    contents: "news"
    sort: "date desc" 
    type: grid
    grid-item-border: true
    categories: true
---

::::: {.content-visible when-profile="english"}

{{< include _activities-en.qmd >}}

:::::

::::: {.content-visible when-profile="german"}

{{< include _activities-de.qmd >}}

:::::

::::: {.content-visible when-profile="french"}

{{< include _activities-fr.qmd >}}

:::::

::::: {.content-visible when-profile="czech"}

{{< include _activities-cs.qmd >}}

:::::

::::: {.content-visible when-profile="norwegian"}

{{< include _activities-no.qmd >}}

:::::

::: {#news}
:::
